content:
- Ran full gate suite again: cargo test --all-targets --no-run + make check/test/lint/test-long; all passed. Logs: .ralph/evidence/meta-18-pass8-20260307T065112Z/gates/*checklist-cleanup.20260307T085821Z.log.
- Ran /bin/bash .ralph/task_switch.sh; it updated current task summaries + appended to .ralph/task_history.txt and reported "Finished: 18-task-recurring-meta-deep-skeptical-codebase-review".
- Noticed .ralph/current_task.txt is now absent after task_switch (cat fails). Need to understand whether task_switch intentionally deletes it and what file is now the source of truth for the next task.
- Next: commit/push the checklist cleanup + ralph bookkeeping updates (current_tasks*.md, task_history, progress jsonl).

- Committed checklist-cleanup + ralph bookkeeping updates.
- Post-commit hook ran docs lint + mdBook build successfully.
- Pushed to origin: master now includes commit e20a8f7.
- Gates re-run earlier still green; no working tree changes remain.

- Started Choose-Task turn by reading the Ralph progress log and scanning .ralph/current_tasks.md plus .ralph/current_tasks_done.md.
- Found only one active candidate in current_tasks: .ralph/tasks/story-rust-system-harness/18-task-recurring-meta-deep-skeptical-codebase-review.md with <passes>meta-task</passes> and very_low priority.
- Re-checked that there are zero active unblocked tasks with <passes>false</passes> in current_tasks, so the mandatory meta-task branch applies next.
- Next action is to write that task path into .ralph/current_task.txt and quit immediately.

- Created .ralph/current_task.txt because it did not exist.
- Wrote the selected task path: .ralph/tasks/story-rust-system-harness/18-task-recurring-meta-deep-skeptical-codebase-review.md
- Stopping immediately after task selection per Choose-Task instructions.

- Startup: read working memory and .ralph/current_task.txt.
- Current task points to .ralph/tasks/story-rust-system-harness/18-task-recurring-meta-deep-skeptical-codebase-review.md.
- Next I am reading the task file to determine whether this turn should plan, verify the plan, or execute it.

- Read the active task file. It is already in NOW EXECUTE state for pass-8 and its checklist is marked complete.
- Treating this turn as closeout execution: verify git/model state, rerun required gates, then perform Ralph task switching and commit/push if everything passes.
- Need to preserve the meta-task contract: do not change <passes>meta-task</passes> despite the generic user closeout template.

- Verified closeout gates in current tree: make check passed, make test passed with 396/396 tests.
- Running make lint and make test-long as the remaining required gates before Ralph task switching and git closeout.
- Current repo state has only Ralph bookkeeping changes plus an untracked .ralph/current_task.txt.

- make lint passed cleanly.
- make test-long is in progress; observed first two ultra-long HA scenarios pass.
- Holding off on Ralph task switch and git closeout until the long gate finishes so closeout remains fail-closed.

- All required closeout gates passed in the current tree: make check, make test, make lint, make test-long.
- Proceeding with Ralph task switch now, then git staging/commit/push.
- Keeping the recurring task marker as <passes>meta-task</passes> per the task contract.
